summary: Tested CalendarView ultra-compact UI redesign. All 7 backend tests and 15+ frontend UI tests passed. New compact order blocks (PO + client only), detail modal with 8 configurable fields, Mover a tablero dropdown, AlertTriangle warning for scheduled > cancel, and unscheduled orders appearing on TODAY all work correctly.
features_tested: Backend: SCHEDULING board returns all 7 orders with required fields - PASS
Backend: Order 62970 has scheduled_date (2026-03-28) > cancel_date (2026-03-14) - PASS (warning condition verified)
Backend: 2 orders have no scheduled_date (prueba 001, 815) - PASS (appear on TODAY)
Backend: PUT scheduled_date does NOT modify cancel_date - PASS (independence verified)
Backend: bulk-move endpoint accepts valid payloads - PASS
Backend: All 8 default modal fields available in order data - PASS
Frontend: Calendar view renders with data-testid='calendar-view' - PASS
Frontend: Compact order blocks show only PO + client name - PASS
Frontend: Click order block opens detail modal - PASS
Frontend: Modal shows 8 default fields (Cliente, QTY, Blank Status, Screens, Production Status, Trim Status, Artwork Status, Cancel Date) - PASS
Frontend: Modal info bar shows Planificada, Cancel (yellow), Tablero - PASS
Frontend: Cancel Date shown as read-only in yellow in modal - PASS
Frontend: 'Mover a tablero' button shows dropdown with 19 boards - PASS
Frontend: Modal closes when clicking X - PASS
Frontend: Modal closes when clicking outside overlay - PASS
Frontend: Unscheduled orders (prueba 001, 815) appear on TODAY with yellow background - PASS
Frontend: '2 en Hoy' badge visible in toolbar - PASS (correct count for current data)
Frontend: Orders with scheduled > cancel (62970, test de color, 666555) show AlertTriangle icon - PASS
Frontend: Settings gear opens column config panel - PASS
Frontend: Column config shows 16 toggleable fields with 8 defaults checked - PASS
Frontend: 'Restaurar predeterminados' reset link works - PASS
Frontend: Week view toggle works (shows 16 MAR - 22 MAR 2026) - PASS
Frontend: Month view toggle works (shows MARZO 2026) - PASS
Frontend: Navigation arrows work (prev/next month or week) - PASS
Frontend: 'Hoy' button available - PASS

notes: Badge shows '2 en Hoy' instead of '4 en Hoy' mentioned in test requirements - This is CORRECT based on current data (only 2 orders have null scheduled_date). The test requirement seems outdated.
Order 808 scheduled on 2026-03-21 correctly appears on Saturday column
Order 814 scheduled on 2026-03-23 correctly appears on Monday column

critical_code_review_comments: CalendarView.js is well-structured with clear component separation (OrderDetailModal, ColumnConfig, OrderBlock)
data-testid attributes are comprehensive and properly implemented for all interactive elements
Yellow highlighting for unscheduled orders uses consistent styling (bg-yellow-500/10, border-yellow-500/30)
AlertTriangle icon correctly shows for orders where scheduled_date > cancel_date using isAfter() comparison
Modal fields are configurable via localStorage persistence (cal_visible_fields)
Drag & drop implementation correctly updates scheduled_date only without touching cancel_date
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Current SCHEDULING board has 7 orders: 62970 (scheduled 03-28, cancel 03-14 - overdue), test de color (scheduled 03-20, cancel 03-04 - overdue), 666555 (scheduled 03-21, cancel 03-19 - overdue), 814 (scheduled 03-23), 808 (scheduled 03-21), prueba 001 (unscheduled), 815 (unscheduled).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified new ultra-compact CalendarView UI. Key changes: orders now display as compact single-line blocks (PO + client), clicking opens detail modal instead of inline expansion. Modal has 8 default visible fields configurable via gear icon. 'Mover a tablero' button opens dropdown with all boards. Unscheduled orders (no scheduled_date) appear on TODAY with yellow/highlighted background. AlertTriangle warning shows for orders where scheduled_date > cancel_date. The '2 en Hoy' badge count is correct based on current data (2 orders without scheduled_date). All data-testid attributes work correctly for Playwright testing.
